headline: How The Hilton (HLT) Narrative Is Shifting As Growth Optimism Meets Geopolitical Caution
summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings enters this update cycle with its modeled fair value holding steady at US$328.16 per share, even as Street price targets around the name shift in different directions. Some analysts are lifting targets by double digit dollar amounts on the back of updated Q4 data and stronger unit growth assumptions, while others are more restrained or trimming targets slightly given geopolitical and competitive questions. As you read on, you will see how these moves fit together and...
